rows.label: tlk70000059_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I never thought something like
that could happen to Shiya. Life
is full of twists and turns.

rows.label: tlk70000059_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Now the wheels are in motion, and
the stakes are higher for everyone.
The money's better too, of course!

rows.label: tlk70000059_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Pay close enough attention
and you can predict how
everything'll turn out.

rows.label: tlk70000059_03_msg0004
rows.name:
My bet's on Superbia
coming out on top.

rows.label: tlk70000059_03_msg0005
rows.name:
They're trying to mop up the Shiyan
remnants and plant themselves firmly
on Gulan soil. Smart moves indeed!
